title: Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose Without the Gatekeepers
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan trying to sell plugins online, but PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad say no. Country restrictions and payment processor limitations leave you wondering how to get paid. You've got digital products to sell, but the gatekeepers won't let you use their platforms. It's time to look beyond the conventional options and explore a better way to sell plugins without a payment processor. In this post, we'll dive into the specifics of each choice and help you make an informed decision. Are you ready to break free from the restrictions and start selling your plugins online?
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you're looking for alternatives to PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad, you might come across other platforms that promise to help you sell your digital products. However, dig deeper, and you'll find that they often come with their own limitations, such as subscription-based models, transaction fees, or even more restrictive payment processor requirements. This is where Unchained Commerce comes in – a comprehensive solution that includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all wrapped up in the Full Stack Bundle. This bundle offers a one-time payment, no subscriptions, and lifetime access, making it a more practical choice for creators who need flexibility and control over their digital stores.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad block certain countries due to regulatory requirements or security concerns. However, this doesn't mean that creators from these countries are cut off from selling their digital products. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, doesn't have any country restrictions, making it an ideal choice for creators who were previously blocked by other platforms. With NOWPayments as your payment processor, you can accept over 300 cryptocurrencies, including popular coins like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. This means that you can start selling your plugins online, without worrying about country restrictions or payment processor limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Unchained Commerce offers a more transparent and cost-effective solution. With the Core Engine, you can automate delivery, and the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, helping you keep track of your sales and expenses. Since the Full Stack Bundle offers a one-time payment, you won't have to worry about subscription fees or recurring costs. In contrast, other platforms might charge you higher fees for each transaction or require you to commit to a subscription plan, which can eat into your profits.
Don't let country restrictions hold you back from selling your plugins online – explore Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle today.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery are crucial aspects of selling digital products online. Unchained Commerce's Core Engine allows for instant automated delivery, ensuring that your customers receive their purchases immediately after payment. This not only enhances the customer experience but also saves you time and effort. The Admin Dashboard provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easier for you to track your sales and deliveries. In contrast, other platforms might require manual intervention or have slower delivery times, which can lead to delayed sales and customer dissatisfaction.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Based on your situation, the choice between conventional options and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is clear. If you're a creator in a restricted country or need flexibility and control over your digital store, the Full Stack Bundle is the best option. With its one-time payment, lifetime access, and comprehensive features, you can break free from the limitations of conventional platforms and start selling your plugins online with confidence.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Break free from the limitations of conventional platforms and start selling your digital products with confidence using Unchained Commerce's comprehensive solution.
